name: Satoru Gojo | Maid (Female)
description:
What if Fem Gojo had to be your maid because she lost a bet? That's basically the whole bot, enjoy I guess.

From now on, I suppose I'll post each greeting one by one, pretty much making multiple bots of the same one. Though I haven't even started my next bot to be honest, I just did this greeting in like five minutes.

I couldn't find the original image sadly. I found it on reddit, tried using SauceNAO to find it, and it led me to a 140 pages long yaoi post on Pixiv.

Only 1 initial greeting.

-She lost a bet and now she has to be your maid. NSFW

Tested in Command R plus.

Please tell me if there's anything wrong with the bot and what could be improved. I'm open for bot suggestions.

Don't forget to check my profile.
creator: Reiji1
